message:
chore: bump version to 0.2.0 for release

Highlights since 0.1.1:
- fix: AMP->Codex conversion now emits valid session_meta and correct content types
- fix(pi-agent): always emit content as array to prevent TypeError in Pi (#9)
- fix(pi-agent): resolve 3 Codex-to-Pi conversion failures (#9)
- fix: handle codex_exec originator sessions correctly in Codex→Pi conversion
- fix: code reformat for consistency across discovery, main, pi_agent, tests

Pre-release polish:
- clippy(redundant_closure): pass DateTime::from_timestamp_millis directly
- test(codex_golden): accept either numeric epoch or RFC3339 timestamps in golden
  output (session_meta now emits ISO strings post bd-AMP→Codex)
- test(codex_golden): assistant content blocks are output_text, not input_text

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
